summary: The team is in full execution mode for the joint report 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global' with IE, while simultaneously launching the Asia Start campaign and building the Intelligent China program.
summaryDetail: The top priority is the joint report with IE, which must be structured and promoted with a one-pager by Felix, translated by the team, and aligned with events at Tech in Asia and Tyson in Singapore for a September digital release. Concurrently, the Asia Start campaign is live with two routes (AI and traditional) for the first month, and the Intelligent China program website and SCM campaign are under development to offer a deeper dive for foreign audiences. Urgent this week: finalize the 'Disruptive Timing' article with Professor Zhu Yang's feedback, confirm report launch events with Tyson and Tech in Asia, and review Professor Li Wei's FT piece for overlap. Upcoming: the farewell reception for Martin Matter on July 1 and continued progress on the joint report and new programs.

meetings.title: Joint Report Planning: New Chinese Playbook for Going Global
meetings.summary: Team discusses joint report between CKGSB and IE on Chinese companies globalizing to Southeast Asia, including op-eds, case studies, and launch events at Tech in Asia and Tyson conferences in Singapore.

meetings.title: Asia Start & New Program Planning
meetings.summary: Discussed Asia Start campaign with two routes (AI vs traditional), reviewed results, and introduced a new in-depth program 'Intelligent China' targeting foreigners with modules in Beijing, Shanghai, Hangzhou, and Shenzhen.

meetings.title: China-Europe Cooperation Discussion
meetings.summary: Discussion on China-Europe relations, focusing on geopolitical tensions, de-risking, and the role of companies versus governments in market operations.

actionItems.text: Create a one-pager proposal for the report structure and promotion plan.

actionItems.detail: To share with president Santiago and other stakeholders.

actionItems.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning: New Chinese Playbook for Going Global
actionItems.detail: For review and inclusion in the joint English report.

actionItems.detail: Website nearly ready; Joseph to work with team to finalize.

actionItems.detail: Decide on route (AI or traditional) once webpage is done.

actionItems.detail: Julie updated the article; Ira will reach out to Shouhuo once she receives feedback on the final version.

decisions.text: Report will be jointly published by CKGSB and IE, with main research from Professor Leeway and op-eds from both schools' leadership and alumni.
decisions.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning: New Chinese Playbook for Going Global

decisions.text: Working title: 'The New Chinese Playbook for Going Global'.
decisions.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning: New Chinese Playbook for Going Global

decisions.text: Target to have digital version ready by early September for Singapore events.
decisions.meetingTitle: Joint Report Planning: New Chinese Playbook for Going Global

decisions.text: Asia Start campaign will run two parallel routes for the first month: AI (Joseph) and traditional (Daisy).
Intelligent China program will be marketed as a deeper dive compared to Asia Start to avoid cannibalization.
Go with the title 'China’s Gateway' for the article on behalf of Dean
decisions.meetingTitle: Re: Article on Behalf of Dean

decisions.text: Professor Li Wei is happy to collaborate with IE on the joint report about Chinese companies going global
